Goomba

Goomba is a fictional character in the Mario video game franchise, created by Nintendo. He is a common enemy and is often depicted as a small, brown mushroom-like creature that walks back and forth, posing a threat to Mario and his friends.

Goomba is known for his simple design and predictable behavior. He has appeared in numerous games, including the Super Mario series, Mario Kart, and many others. He is one of the most iconic and recognizable video game characters in history.
